Parameter classification and binding rules report wire diagnostics at Emit:
unbound inputs, ordering, pointer bindings, optional arguments without
defaults, flag/argument name clashes, and input directives without a
command.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli v0.1.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli => CLIDIR
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- shared/shared.go --
package shared

import "github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli"

type Store struct{ DSN string }

//fabrik:provider
func NewStore() *Store { return &Store{DSN: "app.db"} }

//fabrik:cli:command
//fabrik:cli:flag name=mode type=string default=fast
func Unbound(ctx cli.Context) error { return nil }

//fabrik:cli:command
//fabrik:cli:flag name=mode type=string default=fast
func ValueBeforeDep(ctx cli.Context, mode string, store *Store) error { return nil }

//fabrik:cli:command
//fabrik:cli:argument name=target type=string
func OptionalNoDefault(ctx cli.Context, target string) error { return nil }

//fabrik:cli:command
//fabrik:cli:flag name=mode type=string default=fast
func PointerBinding(ctx cli.Context, mode *string) error { return nil }

//fabrik:cli:command
//fabrik:cli:flag name=mode type=string default=fast
//fabrik:cli:argument name=mode type=string default=slow
func FlagArgClash(ctx cli.Context, mode string) error { return nil }

//fabrik:cli:flag name=orphan type=bool
func NoCommand(ctx cli.Context) error { return nil }

//fabrik:cli:command
//fabrik:cli:flag name=serve-http type=string default=on
func KebabCollision(ctx cli.Context, serveHTTP string, serveHttp string) error { return nil }

//fabrik:cli:command
//fabrik:cli:argument name=first type=string default=a
//fabrik:cli:argument name=second type=string required=true
func RequiredAfterOptional(ctx cli.Context, first, second string) error { return nil }

//fabrik:cli:command
//fabrik:cli:argument name=rest type=strings variadic=true
//fabrik:cli:argument name=last type=string required=true
func VariadicNotFinal(ctx cli.Context, rest []string, last string) error { return nil }

//fabrik:cli:command
//fabrik:cli:flag name=steps type=int default=1
func TypeMismatch(ctx cli.Context, steps string) error { return nil }

//fabrik:cli:command
//fabrik:cli:flag name=dry-run short=n type=bool
//fabrik:cli:flag name=count type=int short=n default=1
func DuplicateShorts(ctx cli.Context, dryRun bool, count int) error { return nil }
-- want/diags --
error: shared/shared.go:11:1: CLI input "mode" has no matching parameter on Unbound
  help: add a parameter named "mode" after the dependencies
error: shared/shared.go:14:1: CLI parameter "mode" must appear after dependency "store"
  help: order is ctx, dependencies, then CLI values
error: shared/shared.go:19:1: optional argument "target" needs default= on OptionalNoDefault
  help: value parameters cannot carry presence; give the argument a default
error: shared/shared.go:22:1: parameter "mode" binds CLI input "mode" and cannot be a pointer
  help: CLI values bind as plain values; optional arguments declare default=
error: shared/shared.go:28:1: command FlagArgClash declares a flag and an argument named "mode"
  help: name-bound parameters cannot disambiguate; rename one
error: shared/shared.go:31:1: //fabrik:cli:flag requires //fabrik:cli:command on the same declaration
error: shared/shared.go:34:1: parameters "serveHTTP" and "serveHttp" both bind CLI input "serve-http"
  help: rename one parameter
error: shared/shared.go:40:1: required argument "second" follows an optional argument on RequiredAfterOptional
error: shared/shared.go:44:1: variadic argument "rest" must be the final argument of VariadicNotFinal
error: shared/shared.go:48:1: parameter "steps" binds CLI input "steps" and must have type int (got string)
  help: the type= attribute decides the parameter type
error: shared/shared.go:54:1: flags "dry-run" and "count" share short -n on DuplicateShorts
  help: the cli library rejects duplicate shorts at startup
